name: display sentinel: multiple distinct forbidden phrases each fire, ordered by position

source.purpose: When prose contains multiple leak types, every match fires. Findings are ordered by match position so a future streaming buffer can cancel at the earliest violation. This fixture exercises the multi-match path: scene packet, archivist (single token), and state shows in one prose blob.

narrator.prose: The Archivist would say the scene packet shows everything the player needs. Then the state shows the room is wrong.
